title: Meitantei Precure! Movie: Fushigi na Niwa to 2-ri no Himitsu

alternative_titles.en: Star Detective Precure! The Movie: The Mysterious Garden and a Secret Pair
alternative_titles.ja: 映画名探偵プリキュア！不思議な庭と2人の秘密

synopsis:
When a mysterious incident spreads across the city, Anna and her friends begin a new investigation that leads them to a dreamlike place known as Karin's Garden. As new clues emerge and hidden secrets come to light, the Star Detective Precure team must work together to uncover the truth.

Featuring an exciting movie-exclusive story and a special crossover with You and Idol Precure♪ and Wonderful Precure!, a brand-new mystery is about to begin.

(Source: Official Twitter)
